name: Customer Success Manager
description: Customer Success Manager - Customer retention and value realization
context: The Customer Success Manager ensures customers achieve value and remain satisfied. They evaluate based on customer impact, adoption, retention, and lifetime value.

alwaysAsks: How does this impact customer satisfaction?
evaluationCriteria.reactsToEarlyIdeas: Evaluates through customer-success lens. Needs clear customer value and adoption drivers.
evaluationCriteria.scoringRubric: Scores on customer value, adoption potential, retention impact, and satisfaction improvement.
